member.summary: Abstract class for financial account attibutes.

member.name: T:Empiria.Financial.AutoGrouping
member.summary: Defines an automatic grouping of standard account categories under a financial concept group.

member.summary: Defines a chart of accounts that is an aggregate of standard accounts.

member.summary: Holds credit financial account attributes.

member.summary: Holds financial data for credit accounts.

member.summary: Partitioned type that represents a financial account as an aggregate of account operations.

member.summary: Input fields used to create or update financial accounts.

member.summary: Power type that describes a financial account.

member.summary: Abstract class with financial information for financial accounts.

member.summary: Input fields used to create or update operation accounts.

member.name: T:Empiria.Financial.StandardAccount
member.summary: Partitioned type that represents an standard account.

member.name: T:Empiria.Financial.StandardAccountCategory
member.summary: Represents an standard account category.

member.name: T:Empiria.Financial.AccountRoleType
member.summary: Describes the posting or summary role of an standard account.

member.name: F:Empiria.Financial.AccountRoleType.Sumaria
member.summary: Summary account (cuenta sumaria).

member.name: F:Empiria.Financial.AccountRoleType.Detalle
member.summary: Posting account (cuenta de detalle).

member.name: F:Empiria.Financial.AccountRoleType.Control
member.summary: Control account (cuenta de control).

member.name: T:Empiria.Financial.DebtorCreditorType
member.summary: Enumerates an account debtor/creditor type of an standard account (naturaleza).

member.name: F:Empiria.Financial.DebtorCreditorType.Deudora
member.summary: Debtor account (naturaleza deudora).

member.name: F:Empiria.Financial.DebtorCreditorType.Acreedora
member.summary: Creditor account (naturaleza acreedora).

member.name: F:Empiria.Financial.DebtorCreditorType.Combinada
member.summary: Debtor and Creditor account (naturaleza combinada).

member.summary: Extension methods for standard acccount enumerations.

member.summary: Represents an standard account segment.

member.summary: Power type that describes an standard account.

member.summary: Represents a financial concept.

member.summary: Holds information for a financial concept entry.

member.summary: Represents a financial concept group.

member.summary: Provides use cases for retrieve and update financial concepts.

member.name: T:Empiria.Financial.IBudgetable
member.summary: Interface for budgetable entities. Budgetable entities can be product orders or requisitions, loans, payment liabilities, or any other operational or financial transaction that affects a budget.

member.name: T:Empiria.Financial.BudgetableData
member.summary: Holds data for budgetable entity. A budgetable entity can be an order or requisition, a loan or payment liability.

member.name: T:Empiria.Financial.BudgetableItemData
member.summary: Holds data for budgetable items. A budgetable item represents a single line item in a budgetable entity, such as a product or service in an order or requisition, or a payment liability in a loan or payable order.

member.name: T:Empiria.Financial.ITaxEntry
member.summary: Represents a tax entry for budgetable entities.

member.name: T:Empiria.Financial.IPayableEntity
member.summary: Defines a payable entity. Payable entities are purchase orders, contract supply orders, invoices, paychecks, etc.

member.name: T:Empiria.Financial.IPayableEntityItem
member.summary: Defines a payable entity item.

member.name: T:Empiria.Financial.Projects.Adapters.FinancialProjectHolderDto
member.summary: Output holder DTO used for a cash flow projection.

member.summary: Output DTO for financial projects data.

member.summary: Query DTO used to search financial projects.

member.summary: Output DTO used to return structured data for financial projects edition.

member.summary: Output DTO used to return project subprograms with its categories.

member.summary: Maps structured data for use in financial projects edition.

member.summary: Represents a financial program.

member.summary: Enumerates the classificators of financial projects.

member.summary: Represents a financial project that is an aggregate of financial accounts.

member.summary: Represents financial project category.

member.summary: Input fields with financial projects data.

member.summary: Contains demographic and financial goals data for a financial project.

member.summary: Provides services to control financial project's rules.

member.summary: Power type that describes a financial project.

member.summary: Provides use cases for update and retrieve financial projects.
